name: Telegram Mini App auth provider exchange and session bootstrap
description: Extend the worker auth model for Telegram launch-context exchange, add TWA session bootstrap and refresh/logout integration, and document the chosen secure-storage fallback policy.

planned: Refactor provider-exchange request naming if needed so Telegram credentials do not live behind Firebase-specific field names.
Verify raw Telegram launch data on the worker with Cloudflare-compatible crypto and freshness checks.
Reuse the existing app access-token and refresh-token lifecycle instead of creating a Telegram-only session model.

notes: This feature is the security boundary for the TWA rollout. It must land before any real TWA CRUD or invite flow.
